llm_instruction: Use this file only after a candidate job was selected. Copy the BASF URL exactly from job.url; never construct job links.

job.title: Assistant Manager, Technical Development (Nansha)
job.description: How You Will Do It Provide on time technical service to customer - Executes and achieve trial (new product introduction) and troubleshooting requests - Performs formulation modifications, evaluations and testing base on customer needs - Follows up development of new customers, applications and relevant processing technologies - Provide necessary technical training/workshop/exchange with customer Technical activities knowhow documentation - Communicates and documents (internal and externally) all processing technologies trends - Documentation of all opportunities in salesforce - Document all technical related activities (trial report/trouble shooting report/lab working report etc) - Collects market information (competitors, customers, regulations, etc.) new ideas for R D proposal - Supports build up regional technical capability and fosters expertise exchange between countries Support function (PM,QM,MM,EHS, PD etc) on quality/material/product analysis/registration/optimization etc - Initiate New Article registration and ensure compliance to formulation change process BOM’s consistence - Supports evaluation of alternative raw materials - Create related technical documents (TDS,BOM,BI,Quality documents….) - Support root cause analysis of COPQ - Defines product specifications for product developments/ modifications Compliance to EHS requirements - Ensures compliance to EHS requirements in labs customer’s site - Be responsible for the cleanness and safety of TS laboratories and workshop areas. What We Look For - Bachelor's Degree in Materials Science, Chemical Engineering or equivalent. - More than 5 years of technical service and team management experience in Polyurethane Industry. - Strong technical knowledge on PU formula design, application development, prefer with PU footwear application background. Good understanding on technical perspective. - Good communication skills in English - Willing to be based at the Nansha location. 请时刻警惕任何可能的招聘欺诈行为！请注意，巴斯夫绝不会在任何情况下向候选人以任何形式收取任何费用
